explanation: Inserted quotes around the task name to simulate a common variation in scheduled task naming while still matching the Sigma rule's detection logic.
Used double quotes around the task name to test how the detection rule handles different quotation styles.
Omitted the braces around the GUID in the task name to test if the detection rule is overly dependent on brace inclusion.
Used a minimal command line without braces or quotes to test if the detection rule can still identify GUID-like names without additional formatting.
